import React from'react';import{Calendar,Plane,Lightbulb}from'lucide-react';/**
 * Features component - Displays the main feature cards in a grid layout with Lucide icons
 * @param {Object} props - Component props
 * @param {Array} props.features - Array of feature objects with icon, title, description, and iconComponent
 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Features=_ref=>{let{features=[{icon:Calendar,title:"Track Leave",description:"Monitor your EL, SL, and CL balances with real-time updates",iconColor:"text-purple-600"},{icon:Plane,title:"Plan Vacations",description:"Plan multi-day vacations with smart date validation",iconColor:"text-green-600"},{icon:Lightbulb,title:"AI Insights",description:"Get smart recommendations for optimal vacation timing",iconColor:"text-blue-600"}]}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 mb-16",children:features.map((feature,index)=>{const IconComponent=feature.icon;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 text-center group cursor-pointer",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 rounded-full bg-purple-50 group-hover:bg-purple-100 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors duration-300","aria-label":`${feature.title} feature icon`,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(IconComponent,{className:`w-6 h-6 ${feature.iconColor} group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300`,"aria-hidden":"true"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"text-lg font-semibold mb-2 text-gray-900",children:feature.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm sm:text-base text-gray-600",children:feature.description})]},index);})});};export default Features;
